He avoids interaction, small talks and maintains minimal eye contact with others.

programme.desc: A Librarian -- a custodian of a magical repository of the world's most powerful and dangerous supernatural artifacts -- from the past travels to the present and finds himself unable to return to his own time. When he returns to his castle, which is now a museum, he inadvertently releases magic across the continent. In order to set things right, he is given a new team of Librarians to help him clean up the mess he made.

Korean idol Kwon Seung-hyun is suspected for murder of Park Kyo-eun. Korean police searches for a Singaporean girl, Hannah, who was with the victim that night. While looking for Hannah, Guo Ying meets Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah, who was kidnapped, manages to escape. She then changes her statement to say that Kwon Seung-hyun had killed Park Kyo-eun, and agrees to testify in Korea. Guo Ying senses something is amiss. She later finds out that Hannah's sister was taken hostage, and she had been forced to give a false testimony. Guo Ying, Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming set off to rescue Hannah's sister but is surrounded...

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 7
programme.desc: Mei Hao Yuan holds its first meeting about the En Bloc project. The supporting and opposing residents have an argument. Shu Juan does not want to wait for things to happen. She decides to form an opposition team to protest against the proposition team.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 8

Ting Xuan recommends him an expert to fix it and he manages to submit the proposal in time. Wei Ren notices Ting Xuan's strengths. He changes his impression towards her, which improves their relationship.

Dafeng is upset that a small misunderstanding caused their break-up. Fuxi tells him to treasure Pin Hong.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 223
programme.desc: The secret weapon for effortless cleaning.

programme.title: We Never Stop - EP 2

programme.title: Love Destiny S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Lin, who has fallen in love with Musong, will only marry him if he leaves his other wives within seven days. Bi says that King Tha Sai is crazy to ban the common people from catching lampam fish so as to keep them for himself, without realising that the King is right beside her.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 33
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Shizhen realises that Taijing is in love with Liandou and decides to break them up. She seeks out Madam Yin to expose Liandou's past with her ex-boyfriend, but Madam Yin dismisses her and drives her away.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 34
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Realising Dashang has feelings for her, Xianyu Xi decides to be upfront and reveals that she already has a ten-year-old child. To her surprise, Dashang still wants to be with her.

programme.title: Freedom Travelers - EP 8

programme.title: Destined - EP 11

programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.desc: Kayla's (Shanice Margaretha) supply of ice cubes melts when her mom cuts the power, leaving Kayla in a quandary. Finally, Kayla goes to a refrigerator in the cafe and without permission puts in her ice cubes.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 586
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: RESEP MAKNYUS ALA CHEF SYANTIK
programme.desc: Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping. Mega quickly apologized and asked her friend for permission to chase after her cousin, who had run away with her boyfriend to Bandung. She received news that Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 81
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ROMEO, JULIET & SI NENEK
programme.desc: Midun, who was in the midst of a passionate romance with Mira, was extremely annoyed with Mira's grandmother, who constantly criticized him, saying he was reckless, had no future, and was rude, to the point of interfering in his relationship with Mira.

programme.title: Lu Bijak Sama Gua Sekarang Neng Basreng
programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. With her kindness even though she was upset Aina (Shanice Margaretha) took Tama (Lavicky Nicholas) to the hospital. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 133
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: 4x4=16, Aku Bilang Cinta Hayo Dibalas
programme.desc: Mei (Jennifer Eve) in her daily life works as an assistant director, she must accompany a director to hunt for filming locations. Then at that time, Mei was upset, because her love was unrequited, namely because the guy she loved was going to marry another girl.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 587
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Hatiku Ganjil Jika Tidak Genap Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Della (Rayna Snova) is constantly urged by her mother to get married, but she is not ready to open her heart after breaking up with Bram (Kevin Hillers). Bram still loves Della, yet Della starts dating Mario, Bram’s coworker who works as a bakery chef. Will Della and Bram reunite?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 82
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PLAYBOY OMDO, FINDING THE LOVE
programme.desc: Tomi, who acted arbitrarily as Dara's boss, got what he deserved. Dara asked her friend, Hilda, to subdue Tomi so that he would not act arbitrarily towards her. Will Tomi succumb to Dara's plan?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 134
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Siomay Cantiknya Natural Tanpa Naturalisasi
programme.desc: Elisa Mayasari (Ersya Aurelia) was fired from her job because of pinjol, which continues to haunt her. Elisa's sister Oki borrows money from pinjol until Robin (Andrew Andika), a Dept Collector, is sent to Elisa's office to collect her brother's debt.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 588

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 1
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Carca Marba - EP 2
programme.desc: Program menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Kisah Tok Kadi S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Tok Kadi yang baru mendirikan rumah tangga kini menghadapi pelbagai cabaran dan dugaan di alam perkahwinan.dan turut diuji dengan pelbagai karenah pasangan pengantin yang ingin dinikahkan.

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar 2 Terbaik - EP 1
programme.desc: Kompilasi Muzikal Lawak Superstar 2 terbaik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 14
programme.desc: Drama komedi tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 5
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2025 - EP 2
programme.desc: Program menarik bersama Sepahtu untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 17
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Dendam 5 Beradik - EP 1
programme.desc: Pakatan 5 beradik berjaya memberkas Jimmy dan pengikutnya. Jimmy dijatuhkan hukuman mati mandatori atas perlakuan jenayahnya.

programme.title: Perempuan Paling Bahagia - EP 23
programme.desc: Rafa tidak dibenarkan berkahwin dan hanya perlu fokus pada kerja. Arissa telah meminta izin untuk menumpang bermalam di masjid.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 25
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Sketso S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Gelak 90 Saat - EP 6
programme.desc: Bersama hos, Dato' AC Mizal saksikan barisan pelawak, selebriti dan influencer membuat barisan juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat! Mampukah mereka meraih wang tunai sebagai mata ganjaran?

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 4
programme.desc: Maharaja Lawak Mega kembali dengan penyertaan para pelawak terbaik di rantau ini merangkumi tiga negara Malaysia, Singapura dan Indonesia.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 1
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 9
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Padan Muka! - EP 10
programme.desc: Pelawak dan selebriti popular perlu menjawab soalan sambil diganggu untuk mengalih perhatian mereka daripada memberi jawapan yang betul. Jika gagal, mereka akan dikenakan denda.

programme.title: NoYa - EP 7

programme.title: Super Spontan Xtravaganza 2018 - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program komedi yang akan menghiburkan anda semua.

programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 5
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 8
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: Sepahtu Renew - EP 1
programme.desc: Sitkom lucu tentang pemilik gerai makanan, pengusaha pusat cuci kereta, jururawat nakal, dan doktor sering terjerumus dalam situasi lucu yang menyentuh isu semasa dan bintang jemputan istimewa.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 9
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan temubual bicara bersama pelawak yang di pentas kan di atas trak di kawasan luar bandar

programme.title: Azam and Johan - EP 12
programme.desc: Azam & Johan bercita-cita menjadi pemain bola sepak profesional. Kemalangan menyebabkan Azam lumpuh, memusnahkan impian bola sepaknya. Ibu mereka menyalahkan Johan atas kemalangan itu.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia - EP 6
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: Sesat - EP 11
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: Diari Mangkuk Tingkat Bersama Ili - EP 7
programme.desc: Bersama Ili menyediakan hidangan yang menyelerakan untuk selebriti terkenal tanah air dalam Diari Mangkuk Tingkat.

programme.title: Hard To Heart - EP 2
programme.desc: Program temubual bersama artis tersohor, mengenai jatuh bangun mereka dalam sepanjang terbabit dengan kerjaya seni tempatan.

programme.title: In Love with Tya - EP 7
programme.desc: In Love with Tya adalah program realiti yang memaparkan perjalanan hidup Tya untuk merealisasikan impiannya dan bagaimana Tya berjaya mengatasi masalah dalam kehidupan seharian.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2
programme.desc: Empat sekawan cuba mematahkan rancangan seorang lelaki yang cuba merosakkan gadis-gadis jalanan dengan membawa mereka ke jalan yang haram.

programme.title: Halal Maps - EP 13
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 3
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada pergi mendaki ke Gunung Tahan bersama kawan-kawannya. Malangnya, dia tersesat dan jatuh ke dalam lubang yang dalam dan terperangkap di sana selama 19 hari.

programme.title: Pernikahan Palsu - EP 5

programme.title: Chor Machaye Shor
programme.desc: A clever thief disguises himself as a cop to recover his stolen diamond from police headquarters, gaining the ACP's trust while a sharp colleague grows suspicious of him. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: IPS Amit Kumar is posted to a lawless town and battles corrupt cops and brutal criminals, standing firm against danger to restore justice and order. Release Year: 2003 Director: Prakash Jha Awards: Best Screenplay Prakash Jha

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gains fame by posing as a woman on a call centre job, but obsessive callers turn his secret into chaos, dragging him into trouble that threatens his real identity. Release Year: 2019 Director: Raaj Shaandilyaa

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. Release Year: 1990 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: Best Film: Dharamendra, Best Actor: Sunny Deol, Best Director: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Story Writer: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Editor Filmfare Awards

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A loyal friend helps a victim escape a cruel marriage by introducing her to a dancer, setting off a chain of comic misunderstandings, emotional twists, and surprising revelations. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
programme.desc: Opposites Yogi and Jaya meet through a dating app, reliving past romances on a quirky journey that brings laughter, self-discovery, and a surprising chance to find real love. Release Year: 2017 Director: Tanuja Chandra Awards: 2018 Winner Popular AwardBest Female DebutParvathy Thiruvothu

programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: Expert conmen Chetan and Bhagat fall for Khushi, but when an old victim Anthony kidnaps her, they must outwit danger and prove their love before it's too late. Release Year: 2011 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Diya
programme.desc: Forced into abortion, Thulasi's pain turns supernatural when the vengeful spirit of her unborn child returns years later, punishing those who destroyed her innocent future.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a fearless yet reckless cop, angers a corrupt politician by killing his brother, leading to brutal revenge that drives him into a fight for justice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.desc: In a dystopian future, relentless vigilante Ganapath embarks on a mission to dismantle a powerful criminal empire that rules the city in fear. Ganapath becomes a symbol of hope for the oppressed.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 6

Marianne asks Aurore, Vincent's daughter, for help infiltrating the world of deep-sea fishing.

programme.title: Movie - Natpe Thunai
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a former hockey player, helps a local team save their ground by training them to win a match against the Pondicherry team. However, a corrupt politician has his eyes set on the ground.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Sadugudu
programme.desc: Chitambaram doesn't want his daughter Kausalya to marry Suresh. Suresh then decides not to marry Kausalya without her father's permission. Finally, Chitambaram relents and the lovers reunite.

programme.title: Movie - Karisakkaattu Poove
programme.desc: Pounraasu, who is secretly in love with Nagamani, chooses to remain silent when her marriage is fixed with his elder brother since he does not want to come in the way of his elder brother's happiness.

programme.title: Movie - Kaama Rasu
programme.desc: Kamarasu takes the blame to save Srividhya's daughter to whom he is indebted. Things take a turn when Kamarasu falls in love with Vasanthi, but she suddenly dies.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Asathal
programme.desc: Vetri leads a carefree life with his two best friends. When an unknown woman dies leaving behind her baby, Vetri claims in court that he is the father to avoid marriage and puts himself in trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Thai Mel Aanai (New)
programme.desc: Raja, a young man, is determined to avenge the death of his mother and sister. But his friend, a law-abiding police officer, does not want Raja to take the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie - Per Sollum Pillai
programme.desc: Rajalakshmi raises Ramu, an orphan, as her own son who in turn always protects his foster family. However, he must stop his malicious foster brothers from marrying off their real sister to a gangster.

programme.title: Movie - Sundara Purushan
programme.desc: A young man returns home years after he ran away. He tries to win over his childhood love, but she is in love with someone else. His brother implicates the girl's lover in a murder and sends him to jail.

programme.title: Movie - Arasu
programme.desc: Thirunavukkarasu, a gentle soul, takes up the job of handling the temple accounts in Agraharam. Soon, he shows his true identity and seeks revenge against a dangerous criminal who is out of jail.

programme.title: Movie - February 14
programme.desc: Shiva falls in love with Pooja, a girl raised in the US, who is in India visiting her grandparents. When she wants to return to the US, he creates a fictitious character to impress her.

programme.title: Movie - Mary Albert
programme.desc: Albert returns home from the city after a long time of separation from his family. When his brother is killed by a corrupt politician, Albert sets out to seek his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sirayile Sila Ragangal
programme.desc: This movie stars Murali, Pallavi and Prathap K Pothen, and is directed by Rajendrakumar.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kannamoochi Enada
programme.desc: Harish, a software engineer in Singapore, falls in love with Swathi. However, her father, a police commissioner, instantly rejects Harish after learning a few disturbing facts about him.

programme.title: Movie - Manitharil Ithanai Nirangala
programme.desc: Santha finds herself in a dilemma when a man named Mohan, whose father is a police officer she recognises from her past, falls in love with her.

programme.title: Movie - Raja Pandi
programme.desc: To save his mother from a death sentence, Pandi kidnaps daughters of some high-profile people in society and demands his mother's release. He claims that she has been wrongly framed.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Vathiyar
programme.desc: A scientist gets into trouble when he develops a formula that enables the soul to move out of a body and enter the person or animal present in close proximity.

programme.title: Movie - Pulikuthi Pandi
programme.desc: A young man named Pulikkuthi Pandi fights injustice while trying to pursue a beautiful woman. However, problems arise when he locks horns with a powerful individual.

programme.title: Davis Cup Qualifiers 2026 1st Rd M1: Hungary vs USA
programme.desc: 26 teams from the opening round of qualifiers will play for 13 spots at the 2nd round qualifiers in a series decided on a home and away basis played as a best of 5 matches as the 114th edition of the Davis Cup gets under way.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 BNP Paribas Open (1000) Final (Live)

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Alula Tour Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Alula tour is an annual, professional 5-stage road cycling race in Saudi Arabia. It features elite international teams competing across the desert landscapes and historical sites of the Alula region.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: European Men’s & Women’s Team C'ships 2026 Women's Finals: Denmark vs Bulgaria
programme.desc: The European Men's and Women's Team Badminton Championships is a tournament organized by the Badminton Europe (BE), held once every 2 years to crown the best badminton men's and women's national teams in Europe.

programme.title: ATP Tour: This Week 2026

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 17
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 29
programme.desc: Michael Kayode's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. After spending seven years in the Juventus academy, Kayode moved to Gozzano in Serie D. A breakout campaign saw the then 16-year-old play a big part in Gozzano's title win and promotion. His form soon caught the attention of Fiorentina, where he made his Serie A debut and played in back-to-back UEFA Conference League finals.

Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW30) (Live) - EP 299
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 31 home league games against Tottenham Hotspur (W21 D9), and are unbeaten in 14 (W10 D4) since a 2-0 loss in May 2011.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe’s most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: Burnley vs Bournemouth (MW30) - EP 292
programme.desc: Only Manchester United’s Premier League games have seen more goals (91) than Bournemouth’s this season (90, level with Burnley). Despite this, no side has had more 0-0 draws than the Cherries this term (4).

programme.title: Sunderland vs Brighton and Hove Albion (MW30) - EP 294
programme.desc: Sunderland are hosting Brighton in a league match for the first time since October 2004 (a 2-0 win in the Championship), and for the first time in the top-flight since a 1-1 draw in April 1983.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Aston Villa (MW30) - EP 297
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just two of their last 37 home league games against Aston Villa (W28 D7), going down 1-0 both times in December 2009 and September 2021.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Manchester City (MW30) - EP 291
programme.desc: West Ham United are winless in 20 Premier League matches against Manchester City (D3 L17), since a 2-1 win in September 2015. It’s their longest ever winless league run against an opponent.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Fulham (MW30) - EP 298
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have the lowest shot conversion rate of any side in the Premier League this season (7.5%). Indeed, the Tricky Trees rank in the top 10 for total shots (373), but only bottom side Wolves (22) have scored fewer goals (28).

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Jose Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending his NABF welterweight title against Jose Miguel Cotto, Alvarez's final bout before rising through the ranks and championships of the WBC. Also on the card, a heavyweight kickboxing clash between Errol Zimmerman vs. Rico Verhoeven.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Goeido, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Kotoeko from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Matthew Macklin
programme.desc: This episode features an undisputed middleweight title fight between Sergio Martinez and Matthew Macklin, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 3 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Agallar vs. Nardu Debrah
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Two Americans will engage in a lightweight battle for the next roster spot as Nardu Debrah of Brooklyn, NY and Nick Agallar of Milwaukee, WI square off in Costa Rica.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 82
programme.desc: All of the Teletubbies are stuck. Tinky Winky's hand is stuck in the bag, Dipsy's hat is stuck, Laa-Laa's ball is stuck and Po is stuck on the Tubby Slidey!

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and follow their dreams.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: Plom, Phoebe, Mae-Mae, Hooper, Zip, and Fly are a group of unique paper friends who live in Pop Paper City. They find new ways to have fun, such as playing pirates, building theme parks and even exploring outer space.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Pug wants to learn how to paint. Our heroes visit Picasso's studio in Paris.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy monster can't work out why his cart won't move. The wheels just won't go round like normal. Off he goes to OKIDO to find out why.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy monster is just about to take a bite out of his delicious green sock for breakfast, but before he can it gets blown away! He goes to OKIDO to find out why the wind is so blowy.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: JoJo searches for a butterfly to complete her nature tick-book. She learns that all butterflies start life as furry little caterpillars.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Duck is bored of his toy collection, so he and Sarah search for old toys in the attic.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdressers.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 18
programme.desc: Nia uses what she learns about lighthouses to suggest covering a big wheel in Christmas lights, so that Harold can see where he's going in a storm.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to show him a good time.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: When Bingo stops playing Bluey's spy game, their grown-up controlling device stops working properly! Bluey now sees how important Bingo is and needs to win her back!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in!

programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch gets into a mountain of trouble as the Go Jetters attempt to climb the Matterhorn.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Xuli and Glitch go head to head as they try to beat the Go Jet Academy land speed record.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Orson is cooking his special version of Bakewell tart. To make things more exciting, he is throwing his friends an afternoon tea party with fancy dress. This is going to be fun!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Malaysia, South East Asia on a baby animal mission to find out why new born dusky leaf monkeys look so different to their parents.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S8) - EP 23
programme.desc: In this episode Seaweed is missing his family, so Sandy organises a 'Boom' video call with his (and Captain Captain's) unusual relatives.

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: A beam of light sweeps through the window. Krash finds a glowing ball bouncing in the shop

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 50
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 51
programme.desc: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 51
programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy wants to run further, but he keeps getting out of breath. Will he be able to take on the Great OKIDO Challenge and race to the finish line?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 17

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 20

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands to see how sea lions deal with annoying flies.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 1

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 33
programme.desc: Whilst helping Duggee clean up, the Squirrels come across an old lamp. Duggee explains that many years ago, when rubbed, it could grant three magical wishes.

programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about atoms, molecules and cells to help understand sizing when they try to sort a line-up of things from smallest to biggest.

programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are excited to visit the observatory to see a passing comet.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail. He builds a series of obstacles and defences to protect it from the tenacious Speedy who tests Stanley's ingenuity.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15

programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 106

programme.desc: Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 710
programme.desc: Special Mission Blaze is on the case! When the Baby Robot from Outer Space turns everyone into babies, it's up to Blaze and his new Special Mission Modes to save the day! Can he rescue his friends, or will he be the next baby on the block?

programme.title: PAW Patrol S12 - EP 1201
programme.desc: Skye, Liberty, Everest and Ranger Aspen head off on a road trip in the Adventure RV to attend a desert concert by their favorite Pop Star, Sierra Sparkle. // There's a new Meditation Dome in Adventure Bay, and Priya is teaching her very first class!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S3 - EP 317
programme.desc: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 112
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 311
programme.desc: Dora travels across the rainforest, creating a song for her dad so they can celebrate Papi-Dora day!/Dora is ready for the Churro Fiesta when the Pirate Piggies eat all the churros. Dora tracks down a treasure chest of golden churros to save the day!

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 312
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 116
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S8 - EP 812
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger's attempts to have his mom find the flower first gets them all in trouble. // The Pups must save Daring Danny X when a mechanical shark stunt that goes awry.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded - is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 23

But when the last pages are missing, the three kids work together to make up their own ending to the story.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 24

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 23

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.desc: Throughout human history, diverse cultures have all used sacred rituals to express their spiritual beliefs. So, is it possible that these acts can connect humanity to a higher plane of existence?

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: A perfectly masterminded plot leads to the most brazen prison break in American history. With only a handful of clues left behind, the search for the infamous Alcatraz escapees continues to this day.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Some of history's most brilliant innovations are also the most bizarre. Like a fully functioning car that hovers in midair. Or clothing made out of everyone's favourite source of calcium.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Throughout history, many have claimed to be able to see into the future and changed the course of history. But what did their prophecies reveal? And what predictions did they make for the future?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 327
programme.desc: A retired Air Force general reveals the story of his American Dream. Meanwhile, Robbie and Danielle are dazzled by the glow of a rare collection of radioactive glass.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: For six decades two silly but savvy entrepreneurs-S.S. Adams and H. Fishlove-turned their love of a good joke into a booming prank toy industry. Their rivalry produced hundreds of tricks and gags.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 1
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 35
programme.desc: A Georgia diner owner discovers the chicken game when he creates a unique fried chicken sandwich with cast-off filets. The sandwich becomes the menu centrepiece at one of the most popular fast food chains.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Borneo (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Jaime gets close to sharks as she dives off Sabah's east coast. Back on the mainland, she rides to Sabah's famous orangutan sanctuary where she discovers some unexpected guests have moved in!

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Borneo (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Fresh from impregnating giant clams, Jaime discovers the training ground of Malaysia's first pro-MMA fighter, Ann Athena Osman. She experiences her punishing training and learns some deadly moves.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Visit the Presidential Palace, traverse the islands and mountains, check into a prison with invisible walls, and check out the Spanish city walls.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Secrets of popes, rewritten laws, and cities lost to the waves - these divine discoveries shake our beliefs and uncover mysteries of truly epic proportions.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 6
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 15
programme.desc: She was the last pharaoh of Egypt and one of the most famous queens of all time, but her death in 31 B.C. has been shrouded in mystery. Cleopatra's body has been lost without a trace for over 2,000 years.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4) - EP 10
programme.desc: When an indigenous sound ritual is performed on Skinwalker Ranch, the team is amazed by the phenomena that are revealed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16) - EP 249
programme.desc: For thousands of years, cultures around the world have held a belief in stargates through which beings have travelled to Earth from distant points in the universe. Could such portals truly exist?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Legendary hunter Bruce Mitchell rejoins the fight with Zak and Aaron. Troy, Pickle, Bill, and Tes team up to help a rancher with a serious problem. While Dusty devises a way to light up the night.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 2
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 3
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 2
programme.desc: With the help of digital forensics, authorities are able to debunk the alibi of one of the last people to see a 24-year-old missing jogger in rural Arkansas, making him the primary suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series - EP 6
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: After meeting at a salsa club, Lulu and Ramon Sosa find they make a good team and marry. But after having financial difficulties, the relationship breaks down.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 10
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: A gas station worker faces down the barrel of a gun and is ordered to empty her registers; a man running an errand goes on a high speed chase to elude carjackers.

programme.desc: A woman is stalked in her apartment; a man stops a carjacking by using an unusual weapon against his attackers; a convenience store clerk uses his martial arts training to stave off a robber; and more.

programme.title: The Cult Of The Black Jesus
programme.desc: Steven Tari, Papua New Guinea's most notorious cult leader, was charged with multiple accounts of underage rape and murder through his systemic use of 'flower girls' or cannibalistic virgin sacrifices.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 5

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 5
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 6
programme.desc: A love triangle at the University of Florida results in the murder of a popular student. An undeniable digital trail leads straight to his murderer.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Joshua Aide, a former Marine, is on trial for the murder of his ex-girlfriend's father, as well as her attempted murder and that of a family friend. He claims he was ambushed by the three.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: Social media influencer Alexis Murphy was on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrived. When a photo of her abandoned car was posted online, her worried loved-ones knew something was terribly wrong.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Wagners stand accused of murdering eight members of the Rhoden family over a bitter child custody dispute.

programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes, detectives zero in on her controlling estranged husband-whose story continually changes in the interrogation room.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man decides to interrupt his crime to make a pizza; police track down a man who jumped through the roof of a port-a-potty; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A naked man allegedly steals an ATV; a man who apparently was feeding the alligators gets a visit from police; and more.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 4
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 11
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 1
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Nacole Smith is brutally murdered in 1995 on a wooded path in Atlanta, the police and community rally around her mother as she seeks justice.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: An auto parts store owner turns the tables on an armed assailant by taking his gun; an armoured car driver survives a terrifying attack; a hotel clerk flips the script on an armed robber. And more.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Ash Dykes gears up for unique experiences-wrestling an Inner Mongolian champion in the Gobi Desert, and witnessing wild horse races at the Nadaam Festival.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle (S10) - EP 4
programme.desc: In Tuscany, Ben meets British couple George and Sophie who have breathed new life into a farmhouse. George's desire to live self-sufficiently lead to a lifelong project.

programme.title: Scandinavia with Simon Reeve (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon's journey takes him from the beautiful fjords of Norway across the North Atlantic to Iceland, the original land fire and ice. It's a world of extremes and contradictions.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: Next Of Kin

programme.title: Four Christmases

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. programme.title: Razor

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Razor

programme.title: Africa Live

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 10 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga finally conquers Mino, and Hanbei becomes a retainer of Tokichiro. Meanwhile, Akechi Mitsuhide (Kaname Jun) visits Nobunaga as an envoy of Ashikaga Yoshiaki, asking him to defeat the Miyoshi clan, who killed the previous shogun, and escort Yoshiaki to Kyoto to install him as the next shogun. Nobunaga accepts the request and marries his sister Ichi to Azai Nagamasa (Nakajima Ayumu) to secure peace, as Nagamasa could obstruct his march to the capital.

programme.title: Medical Variety Show: Doctor G NEXT "Severe Stomach Pain that Comes and Goes"
programme.desc: A medical entertainment show featuring dramatized cases based on actual medical records, where Dr. G, a general practitioner, holds a conference with promising medical residents and a guest to uncover the true diagnosis.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: NHK News 845
programme.desc: Today's latest metropolitan area news and weather information program.

programme.title: News Watch 9 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: The Comedy of LIFE "Spring"
programme.desc: Comedy skits depicting joys and sorrows of life will be presented in omnibus formats.

programme.title: Warawanai Sugaku--a Comedian Explains Advanced Math with No Laughs
programme.desc: This is a unique intellectual entertainment program in which Ogata Takahiro, a member of the comedy trio Panther, earnestly explains the advanced mathematics world. It delves deeply into many complex math problems, such as "Riemann Hypothesis" and "Fermat's Last Theorem", which have tortured even genius mathematicians, in an easy-to-understand manner, with no laughs.

programme.title: News Commentary
programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: International News Report 2026
programme.desc: An international news program providing in-depth report on what is happening around the world. (Dual audio when available)

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: 100 Letters to the Future 2026: Children's Stories from the Disaster Area (R)
programme.desc: Six months after the Great East Japan Earthquake, one hundred children from the affected areas recorded video letters capturing life in temporary housing, memories of lost family members, disrupted schooling, and their feelings toward hometowns turned into evacuation zones. Fifteen years on, the program revisits them to see what those who experienced the disaster at such formative ages think and feel today, tracing their journey into adulthood.

programme.title: The Reality of Russification
programme.desc: Exclusive footage takes us inside Russian-occupied areas of Ukraine - as residents are compelled to change citizenship and even identity, they face stark choices: to adapt, remain silent, or resist.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Ozzy, a grown man, loves pink and uses lots of pink things. Mee feels puzzled about it, and a strange being named "Puzzlin" appears! Every time Mee meets Ozzy, the number of Puzzlins increases...

programme.desc: Each year, 20 million people are displaced by climate change. If nothing is done, these "climate refugees" will number 216 million by 2050. We examine footage of problem areas and the latest research.

programme.title: The Logic of Coastal Architecture
programme.desc: Niigata / Nishizawa Ryue (Architect): Boat builders in one coastal district used their skills to make houses - Nishizawa considers how architecture is affected by a community's terrain and values.

programme.title: A Mile in Your Shoes
programme.desc: We look at the efforts of Israeli-American robotics expert Tamir Blum, who develops AI robots that will help Japanese agriculture deal with issues such as labor shortages and the aging population.

programme.desc: We focus on moyashi (bean sprouts) - they may not look like much, but they're popular as they're packed with vitamins and minerals, are easy to use and - most important of all - are affordable.

programme.title: Have a nice dream

They also educate people on how to preserve Taiwan's beautiful and gifted environment.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 2
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 17
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: IDOL I - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 2
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 13
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2167
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.
